response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:25: Identified vocal performance of '直向エントロピー' by Kazama Iroha. 2. 03:25-04:14: Talk segment. 3. 04:14-04:59: Promotional photo segment (no vocal music). 4. Searched for '直向エントロピー 歌詞'. No direct results found, transcribed lyrics from on-screen subtitles.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Kazama Iroha's performance of the song '直向エントロピー' during her 2026 Birthday Live, followed by a talk segment and a promotional announcement with a photo.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song '直向エントロピー' on stage, with changing outfits and backgrounds.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
その染まった世に
踏み込めない
うまく笑えない
だけどそれ以上に
世界は優しくて

いつか風が
生まれた
足跡が
始まる場所
あの日の荷物持って
帰って
駆け出した
としても
ここにくるんだろう

この景色も
この声も
私を彩る全て
本音なんて
まだわからないけど
ただ風の吹くままに
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I cannot step into that stained world
I cannot laugh well
But more than that
The world is kind

Someday the wind
Was born
The place where footprints
Start
Taking the luggage of that day
Returning
Even if I ran out
I will come here

This scenery too
This voice too
Everything that colors me
True feelings
I still don't know yet
Just as the wind blows

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha talks to the audience and sets up for a selfie photo.
Kazama Iroha shows a promotional photo (a bromide) for her birthday live.
